title: (Bullish Signal) MCHP, price may climb as it breaks lower Bollinger Band on Apr 20, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This price move could be a signal that MCHP may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 44 similar cases where MCHP's price broke its lower Bollinger Band, and 34 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 77%. Current price $152.71 crossed the support line at $151.66 and is trading between $157.85 support and $151.66 support lines. Throughout the month of 03/18/21 - 04/20/21, the price experienced a +3% Uptrend, while the week of 04/13/21 - 04/20/21 shows a -5% Downtrend.

https://preview.redd.it/9930nybh3ku61.png?width=1523&format=png&auto=webp&s=88ea8933f9786df603a962307306bd53327c1135

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Stochastic Indicator is in the oversold zone. Keep an eye out for a move up in the foreseeable future.

The 10-day Moving Average for MCHP crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on March 24, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 13 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 72%.

Following a +5.54% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where MCHP advanced for three days, in 246 of 355 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 69%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 182 of 338 cases where MCHP Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 54%.

[Full information about signal](https://tickeron.com/news/10698931-microchip-technology-s-mchp-149-73-price-may-climb-as-it-breaks-lower-bollinger-band-on-apr-20-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)
